articles.title: Shoaib Malik to Glenn Maxwell: 7 international cricketers who married Indian women
articles.description: Cricket is basically a religion in India but it also has a fascinating record as a high-profile matchmaker. Over the years, the game has crossed massive cultural, geographical and even political boundaries, resulting in some incredible real-life love stories.From explosive cross-border romances that made the headlines to quiet, decades-long relationships, here is a look at some foreign cricketers who fell for Indian women and created lives together far beyond the boundary ropes.

Both More and the audience member have since apologized.

articles.title: Samantha's Maa Inti Bangaaram Censor Report
articles.description: Maa Inti Bangaaram is jointly produced under the Tralala Pictures banner by Samantha, Raj Nidimoru, and Himank Duvvuru. Directed by Nandini Reddy, Samantha plays the lead role. The team has already built strong expectations among audiences with the teaser and trailer. Recently, the censor board members watched the film and appreciated the makers. The film has been awarded a U/A certificate. The team has confirmed that the movie is all set for release on June 19. Samantha has already shared several insights about the film and recently interacted with fans on Instagram, revealing many interesting details. The team has promised that the film will justify the money and time spent by the audience. Music for the film is composed by Santhosh Narayanan. Cinematography is handled by Om Prakash, and editing is done by Dharmendra Kakarala. The film is gearing up for a worldwide release on June 19, aiming to appeal to audiences across all sections. The film features Srinivasa Gavireddy, Manjusha, Diganth, Gulshan Devaiah, Sree Mukhi, Gautami, Anand, Lakshmi, and others in important roles. Cast: Samantha, Diganth, Gulshan Devaiah, Sree Mukhi, Gautami, Anand, Lakshmi, Srinivasa Gavireddy, Manjusha, and others. Technical Crew: Banner: Tralala Moving Pictures Producers: Samantha, Raj Nidimoru, Himank Duvvuru Story & Screenplay: Raj Nidimoru, Vasanth Maringanti, Sita Menon Director: Nandini Reddy Cinematography: Om Prakash Music: Santhosh Narayanan Action: Lee Whittaker, Ejaz Gulab Editing: Dharmendra Kakarala Production Design: Ullas Hydur PRO: Vamsi Kaka
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Akshay Kumar remembers the late Pankaj Dheer at 'Welcome To The Jungle' trailer launch as it happens to be his last film: 'Meri pehli film mein saath the'
articles.description: The trailer launch for 'Welcome To The Jungle' featured an emotional tribute from Akshay Kumar to his late friend and colleague Pankaj Dheer, who makes his final screen appearance in the film. Akshay recalled their decades-long professional bond, starting with Dheer playing the antagonist in his debut film. The trailer also promises a comedic adventure with a star-studded ensemble cast.

articles.title: RS Infotainment’s MANDAADI Starring Soori & Suhas Releasing Worldwide on September 4
articles.description: After months of extensive filming across challenging terrains and coastal landscapes, the team MANDAADI recently completed principal photography and the post-production works are now happening at a brisk pace. Backed by RS Infotainment and produced by Elred Kumar, the film demanded an ambitious production effort, with significant portions shot along the shores of Ramanathapuram. Helmed by director Mathimaran Pugazhendhi, MANDAADI unfolds against a rarely explored sporting backdrop, offering a narrative rooted in the lives, struggles, and spirit of coastal communities. Meanwhile, the makers announced the film’s release date. MANDAADI will hit the screens worldwide on September 4th. Leading the film is Soori, who underwent extensive preparation for the role and is said to have delivered one of the most demanding performances of his career. A major attraction of the project is actor Suhas, who makes his Tamil cinema debut in a character unlike anything he has attempted before. Stepping into an antagonist-like role, Suhas embraced a dramatic transformation and dedicated close to 100 shooting days to the project, underlining his commitment to the film. Mahima Nambiar plays the female lead, while Sathyaraj, Ravindra Vijay, Mithun, and Balasaravanan add further depth to the ensemble cast. The release date poster looks quite interesting. It shows the protagonist and the antagonist standing face-to-face on a rocky shore against a breathtaking sunset backdrop. While Suhas holds a sword, Soori gives a stern gaze. With the sea, fishing boats, and dramatic skies in the background, the poster reflects the film’s coastal setting and hints at an intense conflict between the characters. On the technical front, MANDAADI boasts an accomplished crew. GV Prakash Kumar is composing the soundtrack, with cinematography handled by SR Kathir. DRK Kiran oversees production design, Pradeep E Ragav takes charge of editing, and the action spectacle is crafted by Peter Hein, Dhilip Subburayan, and Mahesh Mathew. The movie has generated enough curiosity with its promotional material, and the makers are planning to intensify the promotional activities in the coming days. Cast : Soori, Suhas, Mahima Nambiar, Sathyaraj, Ravindra Vijay, Mithun, Bala Saravanan and others. Technical Crew: Banner: RS Infotainment Presented by: Elred Kumar Creative Producer: Vetri Maaran Producer: Elred Kumar Co-Producer: Manikandan Director: Mathimaran Pugazhendhi Music: G. V. Prakash Kumar Cinematography: S. R. Kathir Editing: Pradeep E. Raghav Action: Peter Hein, Dilip Subbarayan, Mahesh Mathew Production Design: D. R. K. Kiran PRO: Sai Satish
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Tanu Weds Manu 3 Officially Announced; Kangana Ranaut, R Madhavan Ready For Another Big-Screen Entertainer
articles.description:
The much-loved Tanu Weds Manu franchise is officially making a comeback. After the tremendous success of its first two instalments, the makers have now confirmed that a third film is on the way, bringing fresh excitement for fans who have been eagerly awaiting another chapter in the popular romantic comedy series.

The original Tanu Weds Manu proved to be a major box-office success, while its sequel, Tanu Weds Manu Returns, received widespread appreciation from audiences and critics alike. For years, fans have hoped to see the story continue, and that wait has finally come to an end. The next instalment starring Kangana Ranaut and R Madhavan has now been officially announced.

Tanu Weds Manu 3 Officially Announced

The third instalment is reportedly titled Tanu Weds Manu: The Next Chapter. The announcement was made as part of a major content slate unveiled by Eros Innovation, which included several upcoming projects.

The film will be directed by Mitakshara Kumar, known for her work on Heeramandi and The Empire. The project will be produced in collaboration with Rudraksh Soma Jyoti Limited. While the makers have yet to reveal a detailed production timeline, the film is expected to begin shooting next year.

READ MORE: Alia Bhatt, Bobby Deol's Alpha Teaser Sparks Debate As Viewers Spot Similarities To 'La Femme Nikita', 'American Sniper'

Kangana, R Madhavan’s Set To Reunite On-Screen

One of the biggest highlights of the announcement is the return of Kangana Ranaut and R Madhavan as Tanu and Manu. Their on-screen chemistry played a vital role in the success of the first two films, helping transform the characters into some of the most memorable figures in modern Hindi romantic comedies.

Although no details about the storyline have been revealed yet, speculation has already begun regarding Kangana’s role in the upcoming film. In Tanu Weds Manu Returns, the actress impressed audiences with a dual performance, portraying both Tanu and Kusum Sangwan, popularly known as Datto.

With a third instalment now in development, excitement is growing over whether Kangana could once again take on multiple roles. Industry buzz suggests the possibility of a triple role, although the makers have not confirmed any such reports.

Discussion Around Film’s Cast Continues

Beyond Kangana and Madhavan, fans are also hoping to see several familiar faces return to the franchise. Actors including Deepak Dobriyal, Jimmy Shergill, Swara Bhasker and Mohammed Zeeshan Ayyub played significant roles in the earlier films and remain closely associated with the series.

However, no official casting announcements have been made so far, leaving audiences curious about which characters may return for the next chapter.

READ MORE: Selena Gomez Posts Intimate Photos With Benny Blanco; Pens Sweet Note

Franchise That Won Hearts

Released in 2011, the first Tanu Weds Manu became a favourite among audiences thanks to its blend of romance, humour and memorable characters. Directed by Anand L. Rai, the film helped establish Kangana Ranaut and R. Madhavan as one of Bollywood’s most popular on-screen pairings.
Now, with Tanu Weds Manu: The Next Chapter officially in the works, fans can look forward to revisiting a franchise that has remained close to audiences’ hearts for over a decade

articles.title: Bharti’s Mango Laddoo Rasmalai Recipe Goes Viral, Wins Praise From Fans
articles.description:
Bharti Singh's latest vlog has left food lovers craving a new summer dessert. The comedian recently shared a unique recipe for Mango Laddu Rasmalai, prepared by her house help, Roopa Didi. Blending the sweetness of ripe mangoes with the rich flavours of rasmalai, the dessert quickly became one of the highlights of the vlog. As soon as Bharti tasted the dish, she couldn't stop praising it. Viewers, too, seemed impressed by the creative twist on the traditional sweet and flooded the comments section with appreciation.

How Is Mango Laddu Rasmalai Made?

The dessert starts with fresh mango pulp, which is cooked with khoya, dry fruits, coconut, cardamom powder and mishri until the mixture becomes thick. Once cooled, it is rolled into small laddus.

ALSO READ | 'Am I Dressing Up Too Much?': Kangana Ranaut Opens Up About Self-Doubt That Comes With Being A Politician

Meanwhile, a rich milk mixture is prepared using milk, khoya, dry fruits and cardamom. After the milk thickens and cools slightly, the mango laddus are added, giving the dessert its distinctive rasmalai-style texture and flavour.

Fans Want To Try Recipe At Home

The recipe has struck a chord with Bharti's audience, especially as mangoes remain a seasonal favourite during the summer months. Many viewers said the dessert looked both delicious and easy to prepare, making it perfect for family gatherings or special occasions. One user commented, "quite different recipe. loved it". Another fan added, "Aam rasmalai wao, I definitely try this recipe, thnq rupa didi." "Super yummy," added a third fan. \

ALSO READ | 5 Bollywood Divas Who Turned Heads In Golden Outfits

With its combination of familiar ingredients and a fresh twist, Mango Laddu Rasmalai has become the latest food trend to emerge from Bharti Singh's vlog, leaving fans eager to give it a try in their own kitchens.

Repackaged with modern electronic beats, it's now a global soundtrack for various short-form videos. Its themes of love, longing, and hope, coupled with its wartime association, contribute to its unexpected viral popularity.
